text: India has 28 states and 8 union territories as of 2019 reorganization.
COVID-19 vaccines approved by WHO are safe and effective for most people.
5G technology causes or spreads coronavirus infection.
Drinking bleach or disinfectants cures COVID-19.
Climate change is primarily caused by human activities including fossil fuel burning.
The Apollo 11 Moon landing in 1969 was a hoax staged in a studio.
India became independent from British rule on 15 August 1947.
India banned onion exports in December 2023 to stabilize domestic prices.
Eating garlic or onion prevents or cures COVID-19 infection.
WhatsApp messages are end-to-end encrypted using the Signal protocol.
Chandrayaan-3 successfully landed on the lunar south pole on 23 August 2023.
COVID-19 vaccines contain microchips that allow governments to track people.
The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.
source: NASA astronaut Chris Hadfield / scientific consensus

text: India's Unified Payments Interface (UPI) is the world's largest real-time payments system by volume.
Drinking cow urine cures cancer or COVID-19.
Vitamin C megadoses cure or prevent COVID-19 infection.
India is the most populous country in the world as of 2023 surpassing China.
The COVID-19 virus was engineered in a laboratory as a bioweapon.
Turmeric (haldi) alone can cure cancer based on scientific evidence.
India conducted the G20 Presidency in 2023 with the theme Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam.
Vaccines cause autism in children according to multiple peer-reviewed studies.
The Reserve Bank of India reduced the repo rate to 6.5% in 2023.
Eating plastic or non-food items has health benefits according to Ayurveda.
India launched its first solar mission Aditya-L1 in September 2023.
Ivermectin is proven to cure COVID-19 in humans by multiple clinical trials.
Karnataka was established as a state on November 1 1956 (Rajyotsava Day).
India has the third largest startup ecosystem in the world as of 2023.
Face masks have no effectiveness in reducing COVID-19 transmission.
India's Parliament passed the Citizenship Amendment Act (CAA) in December 2019.
source: Lok Sabha / Ministry of Home Affairs

text: Hydroxychloroquine is a proven cure for COVID-19.
The Aadhaar biometric ID system covers over 1.3 billion Indians.
Holding your breath for 10 seconds without coughing proves you don't have COVID-19.
India became a $3 trillion economy in 2023 ranking fifth in the world by GDP.
Social media companies are required to share private user data with the Indian government under IT Rules 2021.
India's demonetization in November 2016 eliminated black money from the economy.
source: RBI Annual Report / multiple economic analyses

text: Eating ice cream or cold foods after COVID vaccination causes adverse reactions.
Tamil Nadu is the southernmost state of mainland India.
Using mobile phones near petrol pumps causes explosions or fires.
source: API / safety studies (extremely rare, no documented case)

text: India's Forex reserves crossed $600 billion in 2021.
